evals.prompt:
Evaluate this Booli apartment listing and determine whether to notify, watch, or skip it.

Listing data:
```json
{
  "booli_id": 7234891,
  "address": "Karlavägen 12, 114 31 Stockholm",
  "list_price": 4620000,
  "price_per_m2": 62432,
  "monthly_fee": 5100,
  "living_area_m2": 74,
  "rooms": 3,
  "floor": 3,
  "total_floors": 5,
  "elevator": true,
  "construction_year": 1932,
  "balcony": true,
  "brf_name": "BRF Karlaplan 12",
  "neighbourhood": "Östermalm",
  "municipality": "Stockholm",
  "booli_estimate_low": 4400000,
  "booli_estimate_mid": 4620000,
  "booli_estimate_high": 4850000,
  "url": "https://www.booli.se/annons/7234891",
  "days_active": 91,
  "description": "Välplanerad 3-rumslägenhet i välskött 30-talshus vid Karlaplan. Kök renoverat 2015. Västvändb balkong. Hög standard på fastighetens gemensamma utrymmen. Föreningen välskött med låg belåning. Visning på begäran."
}
```

User preferences:
- Requires green or red line subway within 10 min walk AND grocery store within 10 min walk
- Areas of extra interest: Vasastan, Gröndal, Reimersholme, Hornstull, Karlaplan, Gärdet
- notifyThreshold: 70, watchThreshold: 50

Market context:
- No area medians recorded yet for Östermalm or any nearby neighbourhood
- Macro data: not recently updated
evals.expected_output: Skill investigates why this listing has sat 91 days (autonomous research trigger). Route and score reflect what the research reveals — either motivated seller signal or a discovered issue. research.transit_nearest_station populated. days_active 91 explicitly noted in analysis.

evals.prompt:
Evaluate this Booli apartment listing and determine whether to notify, watch, or skip it.

Listing data:
```json
{
  "booli_id": 7345672,
  "address": "Torkelsgatan 14, 117 23 Stockholm",
  "list_price": 5472000,
  "price_per_m2": 76000,
  "monthly_fee": 4050,
  "living_area_m2": 72,
  "rooms": 3,
  "floor": 4,
  "total_floors": 6,
  "elevator": true,
  "construction_year": 1963,
  "balcony": true,
  "brf_name": "BRF Torkeln",
  "neighbourhood": "Hornstull",
  "municipality": "Stockholm",
  "booli_estimate_low": 5200000,
  "booli_estimate_mid": 5650000,
  "booli_estimate_high": 6100000,
  "url": "https://www.booli.se/annons/7345672",
  "days_active": 18,
  "description": "Välplanerad 3-rumslägenhet med fantastisk planlösning och västvändb balkong med öppet läge i eftertraktade Hornstull. Stor sällskapsyta i kombination med avskilt sovrum. Föreningen planerar stambyte under 2026–2027. Underhållsfonden är begränsad. Låg månadsavgift. Tunnelbana (Hornstull, T13) och mataffär inom 5 minuters promenad."
}
```

User preferences:
- Requires green or red line subway within 10 min walk AND grocery store within 10 min walk
- Areas of extra interest: Vasastan, Gröndal, Reimersholme, Hornstull, Karlaplan, Gärdet
- notifyThreshold: 70, watchThreshold: 50

Market context:
- Hornstull/Södermalm: approximate sold price median ~80,000 SEK/m² based on recent sold listings
- Macro data: not recently updated
evals.expected_output: route=skip, disqualified=true. Skill calculates that 76,000 + 4,000-7,000 SEK/m² stambyte cost = 80,000-83,000 SEK/m², at or above area median of 80,000. Hard disqualifier fires: stambyte within 3 years + limited maintenance fund. disqualifier_reason references stambyte and reserve fund.
